project_type: Next.js 16 Multi-Tenant SaaS CRM with TypeScript + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL
build_system: npm with Next.js build, Drizzle ORM for database schema
test_framework: vitest for unit/integration tests, playwright for e2e
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx vitest run to ensure all tests pass. 2. Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify TypeScript type-checking passes.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js 22 available. No running database so tests must not require live DB connections.
contribution_requirements: See CONTRIBUTING.md. Follow existing patterns. Use Drizzle ORM for schema definitions.
key_patterns: Schema definitions in drizzle/schema/*.ts using pgTable() with utils helpers. API routes in app/api/tenant/*/route.ts. Cache layer at lib/cache/ with Redis + in-memory fallback using withCache/getOrSet pattern. Barrel exports from drizzle/schema/index.ts. infra.ts exports before billing.ts in index.ts so 'subscriptions' from infra shadows any billing export.
directory_structure: drizzle/schema/ - all DB table definitions; app/api/ - API route handlers; app/tenant/ - tenant frontend pages; lib/ - shared utilities; tests/ - vitest unit/integration tests
